data.title: Evaluation of the Role of Proton Pump Inhibitors on the Postoperative Course Following Pancreaticoduodenectomy
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to prospectively determine the effects of administering proton pump inhibitors (PPIs) following pancreaticoduodenectomy on postoperative outcomes. The findings of this study will help in avoiding the widespread use of PPIs during the immediate postoperative period following pancreatic surgery.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* All consecutive patients who will undergo pancreaticoduodenectomy with gastric/biliary reconstruction performed as definitive management for a benign or malignant disease at Washington University/Barnes-Jewish Hospital.
